entities.name: V
entities.context: Person whose communication protocols and intent these guidelines serve

entities.name: Wrapper Email
entities.context: Email format for requesting introductions through connectors, addressed to connector not target

entities.name: Forwardable Blurb
entities.context: Ultra-short 3-4 line blurb connector can forward to target person

entities.name: Thrust
entities.context: Intent categorization framework with three types: Sales/Partnership, Info-Seeking, Network Access

entities.name: Value Proposition
entities.context: Specific articulation of value based on thrust type, must not be vague

entities.name: AI-speak
entities.context: Anti-pattern of generic language to avoid: leverage, utilize, ecosystem, explore synergies

entities.name: Context Reference
entities.context: Grounding detail from connector conversation that makes intro authentic

entities.name: B02_COMMITMENTS
entities.context: Document containing meeting commitments and context for intro generation

entities.name: B03_STAKEHOLDER_INTELLIGENCE
entities.context: Document containing stakeholder intelligence for execution protocol

entities.name: B08_STAKEHOLDER_INTELLIGENCE
entities.context: Document containing stakeholder intelligence for execution protocol

relationships.context: V's protocol for requesting introductions through network
V's format for easy-to-forward intro content
V believes AI-speak language patterns should be avoided in communications
Wrapper email contains or accompanies forwardable blurb
Thrust type determines appropriate value proposition framing
Commitments doc provides context for grounding intros
